_source: NB08 shot_data_visualizations.ipynb — pressure_ev groupby(['shot_distance_bin','def_pressure_bin']).agg(expected_value=('expected_shot_value','mean')), Open (6+ ft) filter, min_attempts=75; XGBoost model from NB07 (make_probability * pts_type)

expectedValueCurve.description: Expected points per shot by distance bin, open shots (defender distance > 6 ft), 2014–15 NBA season. Computed as mean(make_probability × pts_type) using the NB07 XGBoost model (AUC 0.6365, Brier 0.2296).
